revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Done%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{#ifeq:{{#invoke:High-use|num|x|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}|many||{{High-use|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}}} This template is often used on [[Wikipedia:talk pages|talk pages]] to show clearly that a section of discussion has been resolved, so that each editor does not have to re-read the section. ==Usage== You may either use '''{{done}}''' by itself for the default message or you may customize with optional parameters. {| class="wikitable" ! Parameters !! Code example !! Result |- | none || {{tlx|done}} || {{done}} |- | 1st parameter (unnamed or named 1) for a custom message|| {{tlx|done|Implemented}} || {{done|Implemented}} |- | 1st parameter (unnamed or named 1) for a linked custom message|| {{tlx|done|1{{=}}[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion|Implemented]]}} || {{done|1=[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion|Implemented]]}} |- | if only 2nd parameter is needed (to give a reason), it has to be named 2 or reason or note || {{tlx|done|reason{{=}}after consensus.}} || {{done|reason=after consensus.}} |- | if 1st and 2nd parameter are combined, both can be unnamed || {{tlx|done|Implemented|after consensus.}} || {{done|Implemented|after consensus.}} |} ==Example== {| border="1" cellpadding="6" cellspacing="0" | {{Pseudoheading|Bias}} I think the article is biased in favour of the school. --[[User:Example|John]]
:I agree, especially the part about the student body. --[[User:Example|Jane]] ::I actually think it gives fair coverage, I read a paper about it online. --[[User:Example|George]] :::It would be great if you could add that paper as a reference, so there's proof. Thanks, --[[User:Example|John]] ::::{{Done}} I added it today, so that should be sorted out. --[[User:Example|George]] :::::{{Thank you}}. --[[User:Example|John]] |} ==TemplateData== {{FormatTemplateData|JSON= { "description": "This template adds a green tick mark with text and is often used on talk pages to show clearly that a section of discussion has been resolved, so that each editor does not have to re-read the section.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Custom message", "type": "content", "default": "Done", "description": "Enter an individual message to replace the default 'Done' text." }, "2": { "label": "Reason", "aliases": [ "reason", "note" ], "type": "content", "description": "Text to follow the text 'Done'" } } } }} ==See also== {{Done/See also}} {{Template other|{{Sandbox other|| }}}} [[Category:Checkmark insertion templates]] [[Category:Image with comment templates]] [[Category:Resolution templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{#ifeq:{{#invoke:High-use|num|x|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}|many||{{High-use|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}}} This template is often used on [[Wikipedia:talk pages|talk pages]] to show clearly that a section of discussion has been resolved, so that each editor does not have to re-read the section. ==Usage== You may either use '''{{done}}''' by itself for the default message or you may customize with optional parameters. {| class="wikitable" ! Parameters !! Code example !! Result |- | none || {{tlx|done}} || {{done}} |- | 1st parameter (unnamed or named 1) for a custom message|| {{tlx|done|Implemented}} || {{done|Implemented}} |- | 1st parameter (unnamed or named 1) for a linked custom message|| {{tlx|done|1{{=}}[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion|Implemented]]}} || {{done|1=[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion|Implemented]]}} |- | if only 2nd parameter is needed (to give a reason), it has to be named 2 or reason or note || {{tlx|done|reason{{=}}after consensus.}} || {{done|reason=after consensus.}} |- | if 1st and 2nd parameter are combined, both can be unnamed || {{tlx|done|Implemented|after consensus.}} || {{done|Implemented|after consensus.}} |} ==Example== {| border="1" cellpadding="6" cellspacing="0" | {{Pseudoheading|Bias}} I think the article is biased in favour of the school. --[[User:Example|John]]
:I agree, especially the part about the student body. --[[User:Example|Jane]] ::I actually think it gives fair coverage, I read a paper about it online. --[[User:Example|George]] :::It would be great if you could add that paper as a reference, so there's proof. Thanks, --[[User:Example|John]] ::::{{Done}} I added it today, so that should be sorted out. --[[User:Example|George]] :::::{{Thank you}}. --[[User:Example|John]] |} ==TemplateData== {{FormatTemplateData|JSON= { "description": "This template adds a green tick mark with text and is often used on talk pages to show clearly that a section of discussion has been resolved, so that each editor does not have to re-read the section.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Custom message", "type": "content", "default": "Done", "description": "Enter an individual message to replace the default 'Done' text." }, "2": { "label": "Reason", "aliases": [ "reason", "note" ], "type": "content", "description": "Text to follow the text 'Done'" } } } }} ==See also== {{Done/See also}} {{Template other|{{Sandbox other|| }}}} [[Category:Checkmark insertion templates]] [[Category:Image with comment templates]] [[Category:Resolution templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
